Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, and incoming customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, up-to-date source of truth for two-piece rotor market coverage and demand, enabling faster and better-informed product decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creative and copy across every running campaign, ad set, and ad unit for scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete, real-time visibility into all live ad copy without requiring anyone to manually click through campaigns in the ad manager.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of collected ad copy for specified phrases or keywords and records the exact field, ad unit, and matched text where each instance appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every matching phrase across potentially hundreds of active ads in seconds, eliminating the risk of human oversight and removing the need for manual copy review.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured email report listing every flagged ad with the exact field name and copy excerpt where each matched phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an immediately actionable audit to the right stakeholder without requiring any dashboard access or manual reporting, enabling fast remediation of problematic ad copy.

summary: We're making great progress across the automation pipeline — with 53 total agents tracked, 24 are now completed, 9 are actively in progress, and 20 are planned for future development. This week we welcomed two new additions to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen agent that identifies local businesses needing warehouse or office space and sends warm intro emails for the 13140 Midway Place property, and **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, an agent in development focused on analyzing and optimizing Amazon ad campaigns across both R1 and DFC. On the milestone front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** has officially moved to Completed — great work to everyone involved in getting that across the finish line. The pipeline continues to grow and deliver, and the team should feel great about the momentum we're building week over week!
